chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Misc. Appln. No. S – 342 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Hon’ble Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 21.11.2024 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Channa, Advocate for the Applicant Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State along with SIP Khadim Hussain >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the applicant submits that the parties have settled their dispute outside of the Court, therefore, under instructions he does not press the instant Criminal Miscellaneous Application. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge ARBROHI
